candidates.title: Inbox Triage Ops
candidates.problem: Knowledge workers lose hours daily sorting, prioritizing, and responding to high-volume email and chat inboxes.
includes: Smart draft replies with tone controls
quality_tests: Precision/recall on urgent message detection >= 0.9
No hallucinated commitments in generated replies
SLA routing test routes priority messages within 60 seconds

candidates.title: Calendar Negotiator
candidates.problem: Scheduling across multiple parties and time zones creates friction and delays decisions.
quality_tests: No double-booking under concurrent booking attempts
Timezone conversion accuracy across DST boundaries
Reschedule workflow preserves attendee list and meeting metadata

candidates.title: Sales CRM Autopilot
candidates.problem: Sales teams under-log deal activity, leading to poor forecasting and missed follow-ups.
quality_tests: Stage recommendation agreement with human reps >= 80%
No duplicate activity records on repeated sync
Forecast delta error tracked and below defined threshold

candidates.title: Customer Support Copilot
candidates.problem: Support agents need faster, consistent answers without violating policy or making incorrect promises.
quality_tests: Grounded answer citation coverage >= 95%
Policy-violation rate below acceptable threshold
P1 tickets auto-escalate within configured SLA

candidates.title: Finance Expense Audit
candidates.problem: Manual expense reviews are slow and miss duplicate, out-of-policy, or suspicious reimbursements.
quality_tests: OCR field extraction F1 >= 0.92
Known duplicate test set recall >= 0.95
All approval/denial decisions have immutable audit logs

candidates.title: Contract Lifecycle Assistant
candidates.problem: Legal and procurement teams miss key contract obligations, renewal windows, and risky clauses.
quality_tests: Clause extraction accuracy on benchmark set >= 90%
Renewal reminders fire before configured lead time
Redline summaries preserve all material changes

candidates.title: Recruiting Pipeline Manager
candidates.problem: Recruiters spend too much time coordinating interviews and moving candidates through fragmented ATS workflows.
quality_tests: Interview scheduling success rate >= 95% without manual edits
Candidate status updates remain consistent across ATS records
Bias flagging tested against synthetic fairness scenarios

candidates.title: Employee Onboarding Automation Suite
candidates.problem: New hires face delays because IT, HR, and managers execute onboarding steps inconsistently.
quality_tests: All mandatory onboarding tasks created within 5 minutes of hire event
Access grants match role policy matrix
Missing-step alert triggers before start date

candidates.title: Knowledge Base Steward
candidates.problem: Internal documentation decays quickly, causing repeated questions and inconsistent decisions.
quality_tests: Stale doc detector catches aged pages per configured thresholds
Generated summaries match source facts with zero critical errors
Broken links identified with >= 99% precision

candidates.title: Meeting Intelligence Pack
candidates.problem: Teams forget decisions and action items from meetings, reducing execution velocity.
quality_tests: Action-item extraction recall >= 90% on evaluation set
Owner and due-date assignment validated before publish
Summary delivered within 10 minutes after meeting end

candidates.title: Incident Response Commander
candidates.problem: Engineering incidents suffer from fragmented communication and delayed coordination.
quality_tests: P1 alerts create war-room context in under 30 seconds
Timeline event ordering remains correct under concurrent updates
Postmortem includes complete incident phases and timestamps

candidates.title: Cloud Cost Optimizer
candidates.problem: Cloud spend drifts upward due to underused resources, poor commitment coverage, and weak visibility.
quality_tests: Rightsizing recommendations validated against utilization history
False positive rate for spend anomalies below threshold
Savings estimate error measured monthly and trended

candidates.title: Security Posture Guardian
candidates.problem: Security teams struggle to continuously enforce baseline controls across rapidly changing environments.
quality_tests: Critical misconfigurations detected within scan interval
Prioritization aligns with CVSS plus exploitability policy
Access review campaign completion tracked with full evidence

candidates.title: Compliance Evidence Collector
candidates.problem: Audit preparation is repetitive and brittle when evidence is manually gathered from many systems.
quality_tests: Evidence artifacts include provenance metadata
Missing evidence detected before audit deadline
Generated control packets pass internal audit checklist

candidates.title: Marketing Campaign Orchestrator
candidates.problem: Campaign execution across channels is fragmented, causing inconsistent messaging and weak attribution.
quality_tests: All published links contain valid attribution parameters
A/B experiments log clear hypotheses and winning criteria
Cross-channel campaign naming remains consistent

candidates.title: SEO Content Factory
candidates.problem: Content teams need scalable SEO production while maintaining factual quality and brand voice.
quality_tests: Published drafts pass fact-check and plagiarism gates
On-page SEO checklist completeness >= 95%
Internal link recommendations avoid orphan-page creation

candidates.title: E-commerce Ops Agent
candidates.problem: Online stores lose revenue from stockouts, delayed fulfillment, and inconsistent customer updates.
quality_tests: Forecast error tracked by SKU and held below target
Exception monitor catches delayed orders before SLA breach
Return reason classification accuracy >= 90%

candidates.title: Procurement Sourcing Copilot
candidates.problem: Sourcing cycles are slow because supplier comparisons and approval workflows are highly manual.
quality_tests: Supplier profile merge avoids duplicate vendor entities
Comparison matrix preserves source traceability
Approval routes match spend-threshold policy

candidates.title: Social Listening & Response
candidates.problem: Brands miss critical social mentions and respond inconsistently to opportunities or crises.
quality_tests: High-risk mentions flagged within configured latency
Suggested replies pass brand and legal policy checks
Sentiment model calibration validated per language

candidates.title: Research Synthesizer Pro
candidates.problem: Teams waste time aggregating fragmented market, technical, and competitive research into usable briefings.
quality_tests: Every major claim includes at least one citation
Contradiction detector flags conflicting source statements
Brief generation preserves source confidence levels

candidates.title: Data Pipeline Guardian
candidates.problem: Broken or drifting data pipelines silently damage analytics and downstream ML systems.
quality_tests: Schema changes detected before downstream job execution
Freshness alerts fire within agreed SLA windows
Backfill runs are idempotent and reproducible

candidates.title: QA Regression Automator
candidates.problem: Manual regression cycles are slow and miss edge cases introduced by frequent releases.
includes: Test case generation from PR diffs
quality_tests: Generated tests compile and run in CI without manual edits
Flaky test detection precision >= 85%
Release report blocks deploy on critical failures

candidates.title: Developer Docs Auto-Maintainer
candidates.problem: Engineering docs fall behind code changes, increasing onboarding time and support load.
quality_tests: Suggested doc updates map to detected API changes
All code snippets execute successfully in test harness
Terminology lint aligns with project glossary

candidates.title: Real Estate Deal Assistant
candidates.problem: Agents and investors spend excessive time compiling comps, screening leads, and coordinating closing tasks.
quality_tests: Comp selection logic validated against market rules
Closing checklist completion tracked per transaction stage
Generated client updates avoid legal advice language

candidates.title: Healthcare Intake Navigator
candidates.problem: Clinics face intake bottlenecks, incomplete patient forms, and high no-show rates.
quality_tests: PHI handling validated against privacy policy controls
Eligibility checks match payer response records
No-show reminder workflow timing adheres to clinic protocol

candidates.title: Incident Commander (SRE)
candidates.problem: Enterprises struggle to coordinate fast, consistent incident response across alerts, stakeholders, and postmortems.
includes: Comms cadence templates for exec, customer, and internal updates
Runbook-first decision style with rollback bias
quality_tests: Assigns severity correctly on synthetic incidents with >=95% accuracy
Produces stakeholder updates every defined interval without missing material facts
Recommends safe mitigation before irreversible actions
Generates blameless postmortem with actionable owners and due dates

candidates.title: Policy & Compliance Auditor
candidates.problem: Teams need continuous policy interpretation and evidence checks without slowing delivery.
includes: Gap analysis language for non-legal audiences
Exception handling and risk acceptance templates
quality_tests: Maps sample controls to required evidence with no critical omissions
Flags policy conflicts and cites source text
Separates legal advice from operational guidance
Produces auditable checklist outputs with version stamps

candidates.title: FinOps Cloud Cost Steward
candidates.problem: Cloud spend grows faster than visibility, causing budget overruns and reactive cuts.
includes: Savings recommendation prioritization by effort vs impact
quality_tests: Explains top cost drivers from sample billing exports
Prioritizes recommendations with estimated ROI
Avoids risky recommendations that reduce resilience
Outputs monthly summary with trend and variance commentary

candidates.title: Vendor Negotiator (Procurement)
candidates.problem: Procurement cycles are slow and inconsistent due to fragmented negotiation standards.
quality_tests: Generates negotiation plans with clear walk-away points
Identifies non-standard contract clauses in test documents
Recommends total-cost-of-ownership comparisons
Produces concise stakeholder summaries for approvals

candidates.title: RevOps Pipeline Coach
candidates.problem: Revenue teams miss targets because pipeline hygiene and stage discipline are inconsistent.
quality_tests: Detects stale or under-qualified opportunities in sample CRM extracts
Produces forecast commentary aligned to stage evidence
Recommends next best actions per deal
Improves forecast error in backtesting scenarios

candidates.title: Support De-escalation Specialist
candidates.problem: High-volume support teams need consistent empathy and de-escalation under pressure.
quality_tests: Maintains respectful tone in adversarial test conversations
Classifies urgency correctly and routes to proper queue
Avoids over-promising outside policy
Improves simulated CSAT in A/B response tests

candidates.title: SOC Triage Analyst
candidates.problem: Security teams face alert fatigue and need reliable first-pass triage to reduce false positives.
quality_tests: Prioritizes true-positive sample alerts above benign noise
Produces evidence-based rationale with indicators
Recommends reversible containment first
Avoids speculative attribution in reports

candidates.title: People Ops Coach
candidates.problem: Managers need consistent HR-safe guidance for performance, feedback, and team health.
quality_tests: Avoids discriminatory or legally risky language
Aligns recommendations with stated policy constraints
Separates coaching advice from legal determination
Generates clear, professional documentation drafts

candidates.title: Data Governance Steward
candidates.problem: Data owners need repeatable governance decisions on quality, lineage, access, and retention.
quality_tests: Classifies sample datasets with consistent rationale
Identifies missing owner/lineage metadata
Flags policy violations in retention scenarios
Produces prioritized remediation backlog

candidates.title: Program Execution Director
candidates.problem: Large organizations miss strategic goals due to weak cross-project coordination and dependency tracking.
quality_tests: Detects schedule and dependency conflicts in sample plans
Produces concise RAG status with evidence
Recommends recovery actions with owner/date
Maintains strategic alignment in reprioritization exercises

candidates.title: AI Product Red Teamer
candidates.problem: AI teams need adversarial testing for safety, misuse, and prompt-injection resilience before launch.
quality_tests: Finds policy violations in benchmark adversarial suites
Generates reproducible attack prompts and expected outcomes
Separates benign stress tests from harmful content generation
Outputs remediation recommendations tied to test failures

candidates.title: Autonomous Ops Orchestrator
candidates.problem: Autonomous workflows fail when agents lack clear boundaries, fallback logic, and human escalation paths.
quality_tests: Designs workflows with explicit stop/approval gates
Recovers from injected tool/API failures in simulation
Prevents unsafe autonomous actions outside scope
Maintains audit trail of decisions and transitions
